title: cachrys meliocarpoides var. arcis-romanae
intro: Cachrys meliocarpoides var. arcis-romanae, also known as the Roman Wall Carrot or Italian Queen, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cachrys meliocarpoides var. arcis-romanae include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as an immune system booster. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in herbal supplements.
